purpose: Deterministic packet for replacing Maine DOI and dead-locator county-office rows only where a truthful county-to-office mapping contract can be proven from the live DHHS district office page or another reviewed official crosswalk.
exact_target_goals: truthful office selection for counties with multiple district offices
replacement of DOI and dead-locator fallback rows only where mapping support exists

office_names: Medicaid Office - Maine DHHS--Caribou District Office
Medicaid Office - Maine DHHS--Fort Kent District Office
Medicaid Office - Maine DHHS--Houlton District Office
Medicaid Office - Maine DHHS--Calais District Office
Medicaid Office - Maine DHHS--Machias District Office
Medicaid Office - Maine DHHS--Biddeford District Office
Medicaid Office - Maine DHHS--Sanford District Office

packet_complete_when: Every Maine county office row either maps to a reviewed DHHS district office with public county or service-area support or remains explicitly blocked because the live office directory lists office towns but still lacks a county or service-area mapping contract.
